title: Year validation allows negative integers
evidence: src/bookapi/handler.clj:23 — validate-book checks integer? but not range
suggestion: Consider adding a range check (e.g., year > 0) if domain rules require it

title: ISBN format not validated
evidence: src/bookapi/handler.clj:29 — book-fields accepts isbn as-is with no format check
suggestion: Add ISBN-10/ISBN-13 format validation if required by domain
